creator: fesse@mail.ru
text: Latest patch from BugId 194381 breaks i386 compatibility. IPFW on i386 needs 32-bit values to be used as optional table field (used to store time), but patched version introduces 'long long', and ipfw table entry timeout goes to far far future, prevents them to be removed by bruteblockd. Without patching 'bruteblock.c' port works well. I think patching 'bruteblock.c' should not be done on i386. May be conditional Makefile?
